my tamaNOTchi

Welcome!

Hi there! Welcome to my site. Maybe you got here from my business card, or stumbled upon it using the neocities site. Either way, enjoy your stay!

For my portfolio, please check the PORTFOLIO tab.
For a list of all the projects I've worked on (and the roles I worked as), please check the PROJECTS tab.

Don't mind the dust, this site is constantly being updated...
